orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: View and manage all transaction orders

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

auth.selectUserDesc: Choose a persona to explore different permission levels

failure.blocks: This affected only this file — {{successCount}} of {{totalCount}} files imported successfully.

file_unreadable.expected: Expected a readable spreadsheet (.xlsx or .csv); the file could not be downloaded or read.
file_unreadable.recommendation: Re-export the file as .xlsx and upload it again. If it opens on your computer, try removing password protection or special formatting.

columns_not_understood.reason: We couldn't recognize the columns in this file as data to import.
columns_not_understood.expected: Expected source records (for example sales or collection rows with identifiers and amounts); the columns looked like a summary or results report instead.
columns_not_understood.recommendation: Check that this file contains raw source data, not pre-calculated totals or a reconciliation reference. If it's a results report, remove it from the import.

records_unmatched.reason: We couldn't match the records in this file to any people or entities.
records_unmatched.expected: Expected identifiers that match your roster; none of the rows linked to a known entity.
records_unmatched.recommendation: Import the roster file first, or check that the identifier column uses the same codes as your team list.

data_not_saved.reason: We understood this file but couldn't save its data.
data_not_saved.expected: Expected the rows to be written to your data store; the save step did not complete.
data_not_saved.recommendation: Try the import again. If it keeps failing, the file may have rows with conflicting or invalid values — check for blank identifiers or duplicate keys.

not_finalized.reason: This file started importing but didn't finish.
not_finalized.expected: Expected every row to reach a final saved state; processing stalled before completing.
not_finalized.recommendation: Try importing this file on its own. If it's very large, split it into smaller files and import them separately.

unknown.expected: The import stopped before this file could be processed, for a reason we couldn't categorize.
unknown.recommendation: Try the import again. If it keeps failing, remove this file and import the rest, then share the technical detail below with support.
